data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Live proctor monitoring or AI proctoring'. While the linked use case mentions AI proctoring that flags if a candidate looks away too long, there is no concrete evidence or API reads that confirm the implementation of live monitoring or AI proctoring as a fully functional feature. This indicates a gap in the requirement as the evidence does not sufficiently demonstrate that the requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No concrete evidence or API reads confirming the implementation of live proctor monitoring or AI proctoring.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
